text: Lesson 75 Uncomfortable shoes Listen to the tape then answer this question.
zh: 第75课 不舒服的鞋子 听录音,然后回答这个问题。
zh_hant: 第75課 不舒服的鞋子 聽錄音,然後回答這個問題。

text: What's wrong with the fashionable shoes?
zh: 这双时髦的鞋子有什么问题？
zh_hant: 這雙時髦的鞋子有什麼問題？

text: Do you have any shoes like these?
What size?
five.
What colour?
Black.
I'm sorry.
We don't have any.
But my sister bought this pair last month.
zh: 但我姐姐上个月买了这么一双。
zh_hant: 但我姐姐上個月買了這麼一雙。

text: Did she buy them here?
No, she bought them in the U. S. We had some shoes like those a month ago, but we don't have any now.
zh: 不,她是在美国买的。我们一个月前有过那样的鞋,但现在没有了。
zh_hant: 不,她是在美國買的。我們一個月前有過那樣的鞋,但現在沒有了。

text: Can you get a pair for me, please?
I'm afraid that I can't.
They were in fashion last year and the year before last.
zh: 这种鞋去年和前年很流行。
zh_hant: 這種鞋去年和前年很流行。

text: But they're not in fashion this year.
These shoes are in fashion now.
They look very uncomfortable.
They are very uncomfortable.
But women always wear uncomfortable shoes!
zh: 可是女人总是穿不舒服的鞋子！
zh_hant: 可是女人總是穿不舒服的鞋子！
